mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(e.buy_in_total), 0) AS totalBuyIn, COALESCE(SUM(e.cash_out_total), 0) AS totalCashOut, COALESCE(SUM(e.profit), 0) AS totalProfit, COUNT(e.id) AS totalEntries, COUNT(CASE WHEN e.settlement_status = 'UNPAID' THEN 1 END) AS unpaidCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN e.settlement_status = 'PAID' THEN 1 END) AS paidCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN e.settlement_status = 'PARTIAL' THEN 1 END) AS partialCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN e.settlement_status = 'DISPUTED' THEN 1 END) AS disputedCount FROM entries e INNER JOIN daily_sessions ds ON ds.id = e.daily_session_id WHERE ds.group_id = #{groupId} AND ds.session_date >= #{from} AND ds.session_date <= #{to}

SELECT u.id AS playerId, u.display_name AS playerName, COUNT(DISTINCT ds.session_date) AS daysPlayed, COALESCE(SUM(e.buy_in_total), 0) AS totalBuyIn, COALESCE(SUM(e.cash_out_total), 0) AS totalCashOut, COALESCE(SUM(e.profit), 0) AS totalProfit, COUNT(CASE WHEN e.settlement_status != 'PAID' THEN 1 END) AS unpaidCount FROM entries e INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = e.member_user_id INNER JOIN daily_sessions ds ON ds.id = e.daily_session_id WHERE ds.group_id = #{groupId} AND ds.session_date >= #{from} AND ds.session_date <= #{to} GROUP BY u.id, u.display_name ORDER BY totalProfit DESC

SELECT ds.session_date AS sessionDate, COUNT(e.id) AS entryCount, COALESCE(SUM(e.buy_in_total), 0) AS totalBuyIn, COALESCE(SUM(e.cash_out_total), 0) AS totalCashOut, COALESCE(SUM(e.profit), 0) AS totalProfit, COUNT(CASE WHEN e.settlement_status != 'PAID' THEN 1 END) AS unpaidCount FROM daily_sessions ds LEFT JOIN entries e ON e.daily_session_id = ds.id WHERE ds.group_id = #{groupId} AND ds.session_date >= #{from} AND ds.session_date <= #{to} GROUP BY ds.session_date ORDER BY ds.session_date DESC

SELECT u.id AS memberUserId, u.display_name AS memberName, COUNT(DISTINCT ds.session_date) AS daysPlayed, COALESCE(SUM(e.buy_in_total), 0) AS totalBuyIn, COALESCE(SUM(e.cash_out_total), 0) AS totalCashOut, COALESCE(SUM(e.profit), 0) AS totalProfit, COUNT(CASE WHEN e.settlement_status != 'PAID' THEN 1 END) AS unpaidCount FROM entries e INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = e.member_user_id INNER JOIN daily_sessions ds ON ds.id = e.daily_session_id WHERE ds.group_id = #{groupId} AND ds.session_date >= #{from} AND ds.session_date <= #{to} GROUP BY u.id, u.display_name ORDER BY totalProfit DESC

SELECT u.id AS memberUserId, u.display_name AS memberName, COUNT(DISTINCT ds.session_date) AS daysPlayed, COALESCE(SUM(e.buy_in_total), 0) AS totalBuyIn, COALESCE(SUM(e.cash_out_total), 0) AS totalCashOut, COALESCE(SUM(e.profit), 0) AS totalProfit, COUNT(CASE WHEN e.settlement_status != 'PAID' THEN 1 END) AS unpaidCount FROM entries e INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = e.member_user_id INNER JOIN daily_sessions ds ON ds.id = e.daily_session_id INNER JOIN group_members gm ON gm.group_id = ds.group_id AND gm.user_id = #{userId} WHERE ds.session_date >= #{from} AND ds.session_date <= #{to} GROUP BY u.id, u.display_name ORDER BY totalProfit DESC

SELECT e.id AS entryId, ds.session_date AS sessionDate, ds.group_id AS groupId, g.name AS groupName, e.member_user_id AS memberUserId, u.display_name AS memberName, e.buy_in_total AS buyInTotal, e.cash_out_total AS cashOutTotal, e.profit AS profit, e.settlement_status AS settlementStatus, e.note AS note FROM entries e INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = e.member_user_id INNER JOIN daily_sessions ds ON ds.id = e.daily_session_id INNER JOIN groups g ON g.id = ds.group_id WHERE ds.group_id = #{groupId} AND ds.session_date >= #{from} AND ds.session_date <= #{to} ORDER BY ds.session_date DESC, u.display_name ASC

SELECT e.id AS entryId, ds.session_date AS sessionDate, ds.group_id AS groupId, g.name AS groupName, e.member_user_id AS memberUserId, u.display_name AS memberName, e.buy_in_total AS buyInTotal, e.cash_out_total AS cashOutTotal, e.profit AS profit, e.settlement_status AS settlementStatus, e.note AS note FROM entries e INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = e.member_user_id INNER JOIN daily_sessions ds ON ds.id = e.daily_session_id INNER JOIN groups g ON g.id = ds.group_id INNER JOIN group_members gm ON gm.group_id = ds.group_id AND gm.user_id = #{userId} WHERE ds.session_date >= #{from} AND ds.session_date <= #{to} ORDER BY ds.session_date DESC, u.display_name ASC
